category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (dust mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to Japan market (Industrial Safety and Health Act, TIIS Type Approval / 型式検定 of 防じんマスク, JIS T 8151 RL/RS/DL/DS).

title.en: China-to-Japan PPE Respirator (Dust Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入日本（防尘口罩）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入日本（防塵口罩）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Japan requirements under the Industrial Safety and Health Act (労働安全衛生法), national Type Approval (型式検定) of dust masks (防じんマスク) by TIIS, performance classes RL/RS/DL/DS per JIS T 8151, the mandatory Type Approval mark (型式検定合格標章), and the critical industrial dust mask vs. medical/surgical mask boundary administered separately under the Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Act (薬機法).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与日本要求对照，涵盖劳动安全卫生法（労働安全衛生法）、由TIIS对防尘口罩（防じんマスク）进行的国家型式检定（型式検定）、JIS T 8151的RL/RS/DL/DS性能等级、强制型式检定合格标章（型式検定合格標章），以及工业防尘口罩与医用/外科口罩的关键界定（后者依药机法（薬機法）单独管理）。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與日本要求對照，涵蓋勞動安全衛生法（労働安全衛生法）、由TIIS對防塵口罩（防じんマスク）進行的國家型式檢定（型式検定）、JIS T 8151的RL/RS/DL/DS性能等級、強制型式檢定合格標章（型式検定合格標章），以及工業防塵口罩與醫用/外科口罩的關鍵界定（後者依藥機法（薬機法）單獨管理）。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, registered-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Japanese law, JIS standards, registered Type Approval body scope, and market enforcement practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The industrial dust mask vs. medical/surgical mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、登录机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行日本法律、JIS标准、登录型式检定机构范围及市场执法实践。本文所述的工业防尘口罩与医用/外科口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、登錄機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行日本法律、JIS標準、登錄型式檢定機構範圍及市場執法實踐。本文所述的工業防塵口罩與醫用/外科口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: Industrial dust masks (防じんマスク) used in Japanese workplaces are regulated under the Industrial Safety and Health Act (労働安全衛生法) and require national Type Approval (型式検定) — a mandatory third-party examination conducted by TIIS (Technology Institution of Industrial Safety) — before they may be supplied for protective use. Performance classes follow JIS T 8151: RL/RS (replaceable/single-use, oil-mist tested with paraffin) and DL/DS (replaceable/single-use, solid NaCl tested). Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not satisfy JIS T 8151 or the Type Approval requirement. A critical boundary: surgical/medical masks are regulated separately under the Pharmaceuticals and Medical Devices Act (薬機法, PMD Act), not under the Industrial Safety and Health Act — the wrong classification triggers a completely different regulatory route.
answer_first.zh: 日本工作场所使用的工业防尘口罩（防じんマスク）依据劳动安全卫生法（労働安全衛生法）监管，须在供防护使用前完成国家型式检定（型式検定）——由TIIS（产业安全技术协会）进行的强制性第三方检验。性能等级依JIS T 8151：RL/RS（可更换/一次性，使用石蜡油雾测试）及DL/DS（可更换/一次性，使用固体NaCl测试）。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不满足JIS T 8151或型式检定要求。关键界定：外科/医用口罩依药机法（薬機法）单独监管，而非劳动安全卫生法——错误分类将触发完全不同的监管路径。
answer_first.zht: 日本工作場所使用的工業防塵口罩（防じんマスク）依據勞動安全衛生法（労働安全衛生法）監管，須在供防護使用前完成國家型式檢定（型式検定）——由TIIS（產業安全技術協會）進行的強制性第三方檢驗。性能等級依JIS T 8151：RL/RS（可更換/一次性，使用石蠟油霧測試）及DL/DS（可更換/一次性，使用固體NaCl測試）。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不滿足JIS T 8151或型式檢定要求。關鍵界定：外科/醫用口罩依藥機法（薬機法）單獨監管，而非勞動安全衛生法——錯誤分類將觸發完全不同的監管路徑。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, registered conformity body, or primary legal source preferred. e-Gov (elaws.e-gov.go.jp), MHLW (mhlw.go.jp), JISC (jisc.go.jp), and TIIS (tiis.or.jp) official URLs are the primary sources for Japanese legislation and standards. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
